	cvta.to.global.u64 	%rd1, %rd200;
	cvta.to.global.u64 	%rd2, %rd199;
	cvta.to.global.u64 	%rd3, %rd193;
	cvta.to.global.u64 	%rd4, %rd191;
	cvta.to.global.u64 	%rd5, %rd189;
	cvta.to.global.u64 	%rd6, %rd186;

	add.u64 	%rd11, %SPL, 0;
	mov.u32 	%r23, 0;
	mov.u64 	%rd777, %rd11;
	mov.u32 	%r122, %r23;

$L__BB0_1:
	st.local.u32 	[%rd777], %r23;
	add.s64 	%rd777, %rd777, 4;
	add.s32 	%r122, %r122, 1;
	setp.lt.u32 	%p6, %r122, 64;
	@%p6 bra 	$L__BB0_1;

	mov.u32 	%r25, %tid.x;
	mov.u32 	%r26, %ctaid.x;
	mov.u32 	%r27, %ntid.x;
	mad.lo.s32 	%r3, %r27, %r26, %r25;
	mov.u32 	%r28, %ctaid.y;
	mov.u32 	%r29, %ntid.y;
	mov.u32 	%r30, %tid.y;
	mad.lo.s32 	%r4, %r29, %r28, %r30;
	setp.ge.s32 	%p7, %r3, %r19;
	setp.ge.s32 	%p8, %r4, %r20;
	or.pred  	%p9, %p7, %p8;
	@%p9 bra 	$L__BB0_126;

	cvta.to.global.u64 	%rd202, %rd197;
	cvt.s64.s32 	%rd14, %r4;
	mul.wide.s32 	%rd203, %r19, %r4;
	cvt.s64.s32 	%rd15, %r3;
	add.s64 	%rd16, %rd203, %rd15;
	shr.s64 	%rd204, %rd16, 63;
